name: freiburg_rieselfeld
notes: A VALIDATION scenario: Rieselfeld and Vauban are celebrated walkable districts that already exist. To use it, delete the two districts from built.geojson (keep a reference copy), regrow with the model, and compare the result against what was actually built. Densities are indicative tiers at household 2.0, centred on the districts' real values (Rieselfeld about 60 dwellings/ha, Vauban about 145 persons/ha).
